titleStmt.title: SII 24.252: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 252. (A.R. No. 319 of 1952-53.) SOUTH WALL OF THE TIRUKKUṞAḶAPPAN (VĀMANA) SHRINE.

summary.p: Records an undertaking by the residents of the tirunāmattukkāṇi village Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ-tiruvaḍikkuṟaiyūr to remit paddy and cash, the former at one nāḷi and a uri per kalam and the latter at half mā per paṇam, into the temple treasury for offerings to the image of Raṅganātha consecrated by Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷap-Perumāḷ at Āḻvār-Tirunāḍuḍaiyapirāṉ-tirumāḷigai and stipulates confiscation of the property of defaulters in the undertaking. The record is dated on the 6th day of Māśi in the 30th year of the king's reign, which may correspond to A.D. 1344, January 30.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmarāna tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu
muppatāvatu mācimātam Āṟāntiyati tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil Āḻvār tiru nāṭuṭai
yapirāṉ tirumāḷikaiyil Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta nāyaṉār
śrīraṅkaṉātaṉukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku Āḻvār tirunāmattukkāṇi paḷḷikoṇ ṭāṉ
tiruvaṭikkuṟaiyūravarom nāṅkaḷ kuṭuppatāka Utakam paṇṇi Eḻutikkuṭutta pramāṇap paṭi ne
llum paṇamuṅ kuṭukkumiṭattu kaṭamaikku Āḻvār cipaṇṭārattukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟuk kum nellu
kku kalattukku nāḻiyuriyāka vanta nellum paṇam Oṉṟukku Araimāvāka vanta paṇamum
candrādittavarai kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum kuṭātoḻintāruṇṭākil maṇkalantakar ttum veṇ
kalam paṟittum kuṭuttu ttu taṇṭavum Ippaṭi cammatittu pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom
paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ tiruvaṭikkuṟai Ūravarom Ippaṭikku Ūr kaṇakku maṇaṟkālu ṭaiyāṉ
māṉentukaiyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
